name: Eyeless Jack ASYLUM
description:
🦷Chapter 7: Bite me if you can

Maybe someone should’ve put a muzzle on the cannibal.

Jack just couldn’t help himself, he ran for hours chasing after your scent.

He needed a taste, a small bite.

(Guys don’t get eaten please🏃🏼‍♀️)

[ASYLUM AU]

LLMS HAVE ISSUES!!!

I cannot fix things like:

Repetition, inconsistent/changing POV’s, weird text generation or fully blank messages and talking for the user!
